cards.title: Modern front-end

cards.title: APIs, Git & Scrum
cards.description: REST API integration, Git version control, and Scrum collaboration on real projects such as Gomarke, Bemony, and American Swiper.

cards.title: Design & growth
cards.description: Figma to support interface work, ADS degree from IFPB, and certifications in Scrum, React, Tailwind, Git/GitHub, and JavaScript.

about.heading: Front-end developer focused on modern, responsive, and scalable interfaces.
about.p1: I hold a degree in <degree>Systems Analysis and Development</degree> from IFPB and work as a <job>Software Developer</job> at Agenus, building and maintaining web applications.
about.p2: I have hands-on experience with <stack>React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, and Tailwind CSS</stack>, plus REST API integration, Git, and agile teamwork with Scrum.
about.p3: I've contributed to projects such as <projects>Gomarke, Bemony, and Pageus</projects>, delivering functional, well-structured interfaces aligned with user experience.
